admissions.testing_policy: Starting Fall 2026, t he University of Miami will require standardized test scores for most applicants. This means that when applying via the Common Application, prospective students should self-report their SAT/ACT test scores.
admissions.gpa_policy: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.
admissions.course_rigor: Learn what steps you must follow to have your college-level coursework evaluated for UM credit.

evidence.source_excerpt: The University of Miami’s 12 schools and colleges offer a wide variety of experiences to students. There are more than 180 undergraduate majors and programs; graduate students have access to a wide range of fields with an emphasis on research.

evidence.claim: Starting Fall 2026, t he University of Miami will require standardized test scores for most applicants. This means that when applying via the Common Application, prospective students should self-report their SAT/ACT test scores.
